stories.task_name: Import Saas Starter And Preserve Product Docs
Page Click And Final Acceptance Matrices
Parent Auth Session And Account Shell
Dashboard Information Architecture Nav And Public Shell
Upload Page Previews And Quality Messaging
Pdf Split And Preprocess Quality Checks
Run Status State Machine And Progress Page
Retry Timeout And Failed Recovery Paths
Confidence Scoring And Needs Review Routing
Share Token And Read Only Page
Weekly Review Compare And Parent Notes
Delete Entry Points And Retention Controls
Staging Deploy Runbook And Demo Fixtures
Full Program End To End Test
Final Ship Document Release And Retro
